===''Pokémon the Series''===
[[File:Lucian anime.png|thumb|250px|Lucian in {{aniseries|DP}}]]
====''Pokémon the Series: Diamond and Pearl''====
Lucian debuted in ''[[DP035|An Elite Meet and Greet!]]''. He was first seen battling with his {{p|Girafarig}} on [[television]]. Then, he met {{Ash}} and {{ashfr}} in a [[Pokémon Center]]. He informed them about the {{DL|Pokémon League|Champion League}} and later had a {{pkmn|battle}} against {{an|Dawn}} and her {{TP|Dawn|Buizel}} using his {{p|Bronzong}}. Buizel's attacks didn't have much of an effect, if any, on Bronzong. Following {{m|Gyro Ball}}, Bronzong used {{m|Flash Cannon}} to defeat its opponent. Lucian later had a [[rematch]] against Dawn and Buizel, though he ended the battle prematurely because he saw that the pair had improved, but still needed some work.

He made a brief cameo appearance on television in ''[[DP040|Top-Down Training!]]''. He battled {{an|Cynthia}} for her title of [[Pokémon Champion]] of the [[Sinnoh League]], but was defeated. 

====[[Pokémon movie]]s====
He also made a brief cameo appearance in the ending credits of ''[[M13|Zoroark: Master of Illusions]]''.

====Character====
Lucian is polite and likes to help out a {{pkmn|Trainer}}. He builds up his defenses and tends to evade an opponent's attacks in an attempt to learn their strategy and exhaust them before striking back.

====Pokémon====
This listing is of Lucian's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

|desc={{p|Bronzong}} is Lucian's main Pokémon. The first time he used it was in ''[[DP035|An Elite Meet and Greet!]]'', where it {{pkmn|battle}}d {{an|Dawn}}'s newly captured {{TP|Dawn|Buizel}}. Because Buizel didn't listen to Dawn, he quickly lost. Later in the same episode, they had a [[rematch]], and because Buizel was now listening to Dawn, the battle went better. However, Lucian eventually recalled Bronzong, saying that he had just wanted to prove Buizel's potential for becoming strong.

Lucian's match against [[Cynthia's Garchomp]] was televised in ''[[DP040|Top-Down Training!]]'', but the Bronze Bell Pokémon was soon [[fainting|knocked out]] by the Mach Pokémon's powerful {{m|Giga Impact}}.

Bronzong also appeared alongside Lucian during the credits of ''[[M13|Zoroark: Master of Illusions]]''.

Bronzong's known moves are {{m|Iron Defense}}, {{m|Gyro Ball}}, and {{m|Flash Cannon}}.}}
